short_summary: Iran deal signing Friday; markets up
rationale: The US-Iran peace deal signing expected Friday is the dominant story — markets soaring and oil falling are already priced into the baseline; questions and risks flagged by BBC introduce slight uncertainty but no new qualitative leap.

top_events.title: US-Iran peace deal signing Friday; stock markets soar, oil falls; questions remain
top_events.summary: Markets continue rallying and oil prices falling as the formal deal signing approaches Friday, but BBC highlights unresolved risks — continuation of last cycle's confirmed ceasefire baseline with modest positive momentum.

top_events.title: Claims Israel's Beirut strike pushed Trump on Iran announcement
top_events.summary: Reports that an Israeli strike influenced the timing of Trump's Iran deal announcement raise questions about US control of the deal's terms and regional stability — relevant to US foreign policy credibility.

top_events.title: China arrests US academic at conference for espionage
top_events.summary: Another US academic detained in China continues the established pattern of tit-for-tat detentions — no new qualitative escalation beyond the known baseline.
